scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix header" "npm start --prefix banner" "npm start --prefix shell"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix shell && npm install --prefix header && npm install --prefix banner
scripts.build: npm run build:header && npm run build:banner && npm run build:shell && npm run build:merge
scripts.build:header: cd header && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack --mode production
scripts.build:banner: cd banner && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack --mode production
scripts.build:shell: cd shell && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack --mode production
